game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Snake VS Block:** Players control a snake composed of multiple balls, which continuously moves forward up an endless vertical track, steering horizontally by swiping left or right across the screen. The core mechanic involves navigating through a field of numbered blocks and collectible balls; colliding with a block reduces the snake's length by the block's displayed number (e.g., a '10' block removes 10 balls), while collecting small, unnumbered balls increases the snake's length by 1-5 units. The game features endless progression where the objective is to achieve the highest possible score by surviving as long as possible, with difficulty scaling as block numbers increase from 5 to 50+ and their spawn frequency and density intensify. The run immediately ends when the snake's total ball count reaches zero after hitting a block, emphasizing strategic movement to target lower-numbered blocks or collect enough balls to sustain hits.
game_info.description: Control a snake made of glowing orbs as it races endlessly upward through a dangerous gauntlet of numbered blocks. Your snake shrinks when hitting blocks (by the number shown), but grows by collecting floating orbs. Survive as long as possible by weaving through gaps, targeting low-numbered blocks, and gathering orbs to maintain your length. The game ends when your snake runs out of orbs. Score increases with distance traveled and orbs collected.
game_info.controls:
Left Arrow: Move snake left
Right Arrow: Move snake right
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and validates that the snake can move left and right in response to automated inputs. Ensures position tracking works correctly and the snake doesn't go out of bounds.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Alternates between left and right movements at regular intervals to test horizontal movement across the canvas width. Validates that the snake position changes appropriately and stays within canvas boundaries.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Snake successfully moves left and right without going out of bounds. Position updates are logged correctly in player_info. No crashes or freezing. Test runs for at least 300 frames to validate sustained movement.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement mechanics and validates that the snake can move left and right in response to automated inputs. Ensures position tracking works correctly and the snake doesn't go out of bounds.

TEST_1.expected: Snake successfully moves left and right without going out of bounds. Position updates are logged correctly in player_info. No crashes or freezing. Test runs for at least 300 frames to validate sustained movement.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal survival strategy to achieve the highest possible score and potentially "win" by surviving for an extended period. Validates collision detection with blocks and orbs, and tests the core game loop under ideal play conditions.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implements intelligent pathfinding that analyzes upcoming blocks and orbs. Prioritizes collecting orbs when snake length is low, avoids high-numbered blocks, and aims for gaps or lowest-numbered blocks. Uses predictive movement based on scroll speed to plan ahead.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Snake survives significantly longer than random play, collecting orbs strategically and avoiding dangerous blocks. Score reaches high values (500+). Test demonstrates that skilled play can extend gameplay substantially, validating game balance.

TEST_2.expected: Snake survives significantly longer than random play, collecting orbs strategically and avoiding dangerous blocks. Score reaches high values (500+). Test demonstrates that skilled play can extend gameplay substantially, validating game balance.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests collision mechanics specifically by intentionally hitting blocks to verify length reduction works correctly and game over triggers when length reaches zero.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately steers the snake into blocks to test collision detection and length reduction. Monitors snake length decrease and validates that hitting a block with value greater than current length triggers game over.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Collisions with blocks correctly reduce snake length by the block's number. Game over state triggers when snake length reaches zero. All collision events are properly logged and processed without errors.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests orb collection mechanics and validates that collecting orbs increases snake length correctly. Ensures visual feedback and score updates work properly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Actively seeks out and collects orbs while avoiding blocks. Tracks length increases and verifies they match collected orbs. Tests both single orb collection and rapid sequential collections.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Each collected orb increases snake length by 1-5 as designed. Score increases appropriately. Visual representation of snake accurately reflects length changes. No duplication or missed collection events.
TEST_4.description: Tests orb collection mechanics and validates that collecting orbs increases snake length correctly. Ensures visual feedback and score updates work properly.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests game progression and difficulty scaling by surviving long enough to encounter higher-numbered blocks and increased spawn density.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Plays optimally for an extended period to reach later stages where blocks have higher numbers (30+) and spawn more densely. Validates that difficulty increases appropriately over time.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Block numbers increase as the game progresses. Spawn frequency and density increase noticeably. Game remains playable but more challenging at higher scores. Progression system works as designed.
